ValidationRule.description:
&& ($Profile.Name !="System Administrator" )
&& IF($Profile.Name ="SW SalesOps",MONTH( CloseDate ) != MONTH(TODAY()),TRUE) להוריד שורה במקום
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
(IsNew() || IsChanged (StageName) || ISCHANGED( CloseDate ) ) && CloseDate < DATE( YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(TODAY()), 1) && NOT ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Stalled') && ($Profile.Name !="System Administrator" ) && ($Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended" ) && ($Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps")
&& ! $User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && NOT( ISCHANGED( Open_Activity_Count__c ) ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Close Date cannot be prior to current month. Please contact an administrator if you need further assistance.
